title: JSON Parser Pro
shortDescription: Json Parser Pro is a material-styled workbench for serious JSON work: dual code/tree views, JSONPath search, pretty/minify/sort, CSV export, and file diff—everything offline.
description: Json Parser Pro is a material-styled workbench for serious JSON work: dual code/tree views, JSONPath search, pretty/minify/sort, CSV export, and file diff—everything offline. A multi-threaded engine keeps large payloads smooth with no telemetry and no clutter
features: ✅ Parse & validate JSON with precise error reporting and document stats
🔎 JSONPath queries ($.a.b[0], bracket keys, [*]) + Copy JSONPath from any node
🧾 Pretty / Minify / Key-sort with stable, deterministic output
🧹 Cleanup tools: remove null/empty values recursively
📤 CSV export from an array of objects (auto header merge)
🆚 File diff/compare with normalized JSON for reliable results
🔤 Unicode normalization (smart quotes → plain) to prevent parse errors
🔍 In-source search for rapid navigation in large payloads
benefits: Keep technical workflows visible and controlled
Move from task to result with fewer manual steps
Built around parse & validate JSON with precise error reporting and document stats
Built around jSONPath queries ($.a.b[0], bracket keys, [*]) + Copy JSONPath from any node
Built around pretty / Minify / Key-sort with stable, deterministic output
extractedFrom: Microsoft Store publisher search and product detail APIs
